arts.ttl: Man Utd Alerted as Barcelona, PSG Eye €75M-Rated Star Who Wants to Leave Portuguese Giants
arts.sum: While Paris Saint-Germain loaned out Randal Kolo Muani to Juventus, the Frenchman will likely leave this summer, meaning the capital club could be in the market for a No. 9. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich, Real Madrid Have Major Interest in PSG, Tottenham Target Who Will Add More Youth
arts.sum: Last summer, Paris Saint-Germain expressed interest in Dean Huijsen as they aimed to strengthen their defense, but the Spanish center-back ultimately joined AFC Bournemouth. If PSG makes another move for him, they’ll face stiff competition. PSG bolstered their defense with Willian Pacho, but with Milan Skriniar likely to make his loan to Fenerbahçe permanent, they […] The post Bayern Munich, Real Madrid Have Major Interest in PSG, Tottenham Target Who Will Add More Youth appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Have Two Reasons in Not Pursuing Juventus, PSG Transfer Target This Summer
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have quality midfield talent, but one area where they’re lacking is height. Fabian Ruiz, at 6′ 2″ (1.89m), is the tallest player, and after him, there aren’t many options near his stature. Senny Mayulu stands at 6′ 0″ (1.83m), but the 18-year-old is one of the few players with a similar height. As […] The post Barcelona Have Two Reasons in Not Pursuing Juventus, PSG Transfer Target This Summer appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot insists Liverpool's clash with Southampton is their 'most important' in upcoming week of 'three finals' - with PSG and Newcastles ties looming
arts.sum: DOMINIC KING: Arne Slot has warned Liverpool 's players they face a week of three finals - and that Saturday's Anfield clash with Southampton is the most important of all.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Make Major Decision on £150M-Rated Liverpool, PSG Target as Newcastle Need Champions League
arts.sum: The winter transfer window has closed, and for now, Alexander Isak is staying with Newcastle United. While there wasn’t much speculation about a move this winter, several clubs, including PSG, are expected to make another push in the summer. arts.ttl: Liverpool Willing to Pay €80M for Man City, PSG Target Who Will Be Mo Salah Replacement
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have prioritized young talent in recent transfer windows, focusing on players still unlocking their full potential. The Ligue 1 club added Khvicha Kvaratskhelia from Napoli to its squad this winter transfer window. Kvaratskhelia joins recent signings Willian Pacho and João Neves, and with the summer window approaching, PSG could target another promising prospect. arts.sum: Arsenal are running out of time to catch runaway Premier League leaders Liverpool but their former defender Bacary Sagna isn't drawing a line under the season just yet
